member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.Algorithm.SimilarMangaNameComparor
member.summary: 本子名比较器，用于从一堆类似的本子中选出可能相同的本子。

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.Algorithm.SimilarMangaNameComparor.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga})
member.summary: 本子名比较器，用于从一堆类似的本子中选出可能相同的本子。

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.Algorithm.SimilarMangaNameComparor.CompareByMangaName
member.summary: 依据本子名进行比较，找出这个本子的名。 本子名（如xxx1，xxx2，yyy前篇，yyy后篇，zzz上，zzz下。 有的本子名既有原名也有译名，有的本子名是译名而不是原名） 很多喜欢用空格进行分隔

member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.Exporter
member.summary: 对外导出功能

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.Exporter.Export_PDFSharp(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga,System.String)
member.summary: 通过pdfsharp库导出pdf，MIT协议，有书签功能，但有些日文会乱码

member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO
member.summary: manga的io操作

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO.LoadMangaInfo(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 高级属性加载

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO.CountFileSize(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 统计漫画文件大小，压缩包则获取文件大小，文件夹则统计内部图片大小

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO.Exists(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 漫画文件是否存在

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO.CountImageAmount(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 统计内部图片数量

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO.LoadChapter(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 加载内部章节信息

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO.CountChapterAmount(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 计算manga中的章节数，此方法只统计数量，并无具体章节信息

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.MangaFileIO.MoveManga(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 移动、重命名漫画。
member.param: 目标文件夹
新名字

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.ZipEntryHelper.SortEntriesByName(SharpCompress.Archives.IArchive,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String}})
member.summary: 排序zipentry

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.IOOperation.ZipEntryHelper.EntryFilter(SharpCompress.Archives.IArchiveEntry,EroMangaDatabase.Entities.FilteredImage[])
member.summary: 筛选zipentry，如果filteredImages为null，则不进行比较
member.param: 要进行比较的数据，如果为null，则不进行数据比较

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Chapter.Manga
member.summary: 源manga

member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga
member.summary: 本子

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.coverPath
member.summary: 封面文件路径
member.remarks: 这个一定要有，不能为null，不然在Image控件加载图像时会异常导致程序闪退

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.imageAmount
member.summary: 内里多少图像文件

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.filePath
member.summary: 漫画文件路径

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.chapterAmount
member.summary: 章节。每个含有图片的文件夹视为一个chapter。仅在快速统计章节量时使用，应使用chapters属性

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.translatedMangaName
member.summary: 漫画翻译后的名称

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: 实例化EroManga

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.type
member.summary: 本子类型，可以为.zip .7z 文件夹，这也是对应的文件后缀名，文件夹的话为“”空字符串

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.fileDisplayName
member.summary: 文件Display名（不带扩展名）

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.fileFullName
member.summary: 漫画文件名（全名，带扩展名，不包含文件夹名）

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.fileSize
member.summary: 获取漫画文件大小。单位：字节

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.folderPath
member.summary: 漫画文件所在文件夹路径

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.mangaName
member.summary: 本子名字。第一个括号外的内容（括号外内容可能有多个,也可能所有内容都在括号内）

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga.tags
member.summary: 文件名中包含在括号的本子Tag

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.

member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: 项删除

member.summary: 是否显示空文件夹

member.summary: app默认UI语言

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.General.LanguageIndex
member.summary: 语言序数

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.General.Theme
member.summary: 系统主题

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.General.BookcaseTemplateKey
member.summary: 默认书架界面

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.General.WhetherPickSubFolder
member.summary: 是否加载子文件夹

member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.DefaultAppUILanguageStrings
member.summary: app默认UI语言

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.DefaultAppUILanguageStrings.zhCN
member.summary: 简中

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.DefaultAppUILanguageStrings.en
member.summary: 英文

member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWay3
member.summary: 新的漫画打开方式设置，旧的不再使用

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWay3.WayIndex
member.summary: 绑定序数

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWay3.OpenWays
member.summary: 打开方式字符串都放这里，因为config.net还不支持集合，用这个代替，需要在外部再套一层集合操作 ?的两个为默认设置，|后面跟的是打开exe

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWay3.DefaultWay
member.summary: 默认exe，注意，在MangaeMangaOpenWay3Setting.xaml控件中，RadioButtons无法通过此设置数据绑定（双向不可以，单向不知道），额外通过wayindex来绑定。

member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWaySetting
member.summary: 漫画打开方式相关设置

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWaySetting.ReadMangaWay
member.summary: 打开漫画方式

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWaySetting.ReadMangaWayIndex
member.summary: 打开漫画的方式顺序，不再用上面那个

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWaySetting.UserSelectedReadMangaExePath
member.summary: 用户选择的打开漫画方式

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.MangaOpenWaySetting.PossibleExePaths
member.summary: 用户添加的exe路径拼接后字符串，路径由英文竖分割（不是中文竖）：|。因为config.net目前不支持写集合，所以用这个折中方法

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.ReadMangaWayStrings.InternalReadPage
member.summary: 内部ReadPage，

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.ReadMangaWayStrings.OSRelated
member.summary: 系统决定的关联打开方式

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.ReadMangaWayStrings.UserSelected
member.summary: 用户选定的exe

member.summary: 主题设置值，这个值对应ComboBox的索引值

member.summary: 深色

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.Setting.ThemeValue.Light
member.summary: 浅色

member.summary: 出现无法解析的Manga时引发

member.summary: 删除本子源文件后引发的事件

member.summary: 完成某项任务时引发

member.summary: 任务失败事件

member.summary: 访问被拒绝，通常因文件权限不足引发

member.summary: 本子文件夹集合

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ObservableCollectionVM.AllTags
member.summary: 所有标签

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ObservableCollectionVM.IsContentInitializing
member.summary: MangasFolder是否正在更新，有任意一个是则返回true

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ObservableCollectionVM.EnsureAddFolder(System.String,EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.MangasGroup@)
member.summary: 确保已添加文件夹，并添加到集合。如果已存在这个folder，则返回true;否则返回false并创建新的

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ObservableCollectionVM.RemoveFolder(EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.MangasGroup)
member.summary: 移除文件夹，并从集合中移除文件夹及下属漫画 （只移除，不删除） 1.从系统API中移除 2.从FolderList里移除 3.从MangaList里移除文件夹下属漫画

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ObservableCollectionVM.InvokeEvent_AfterDeleteMnagaSource(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 删除manga后执行此事件

member.summary: 尝试移除一个本子文件，成功返回true，失败或未删除返回false

member.summary: 事情完成时发生

member.summary: 任务失败

member.summary: 触发访问被拒绝异常

member.summary: 发现错误漫画时引发

member.summary: 后台更新MangasGroup的Func

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ObservableCollectionVM.StartInitial
member.summary: 开始初始化所有MangasGroup，会以自我递归的方式，初始化所有groups

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ObservableCollectionVM.PlaceInCorrectGroup(EroMangaManager.Core.Models.Manga)
member.summary: 把一个本子放到他应该在的集合里面，这个一般用在移动本子后

member.name: T:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ReaderVM
member.summary: 阅读页面的ViewModel

member.name: F:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ReaderVM._IsClosing
member.summary: 现在是否在打开这个本子，如果是的话，这个为真，否则，为假。设置这个是因为加载所有图片很长，有时候图正在加载中，本子就关闭了，需要这个作为

member.name: P:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ReaderVM.Stream
member.summary: 打开的文件流

member.summary: 压缩文件

member.summary: 压缩文件的所有entry

member.summary: 对应词典

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ReaderVM.GetOrAddShowedEntry(SharpCompress.Archives.IArchiveEntry)
member.summary: 显示指定entry，并添加到图片字典中, 如果返回null，则未能正常打开流

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ReaderVM.ShowFilteredBitmapImages
member.summary: 所有筛选过的entry一次性转化为图片

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.ReaderVM.SelectEntries(EroMangaDatabase.Entities.FilteredImage[])
member.summary: 从压缩文件的所有entry中，筛选出符合条件的，传入null则为不进行筛选

member.summary: 表示查重方法执行中

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.Method3_1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource)
member.summary: 先传入tag集合，对每个tag，找出重复的本子

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.Method2(System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource)
member.summary: 先找出第一次重复的tag和manganame，然后以此为key，循环查找 TODO 需要优化

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.Method1
member.summary: 将所有manganame分别切成小段，将所有小段重组成一个字典，各小段设为key，所有含有这个key的视为重复组

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.Method0(System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource)
member.summary: 遍历找出两个相同manganame，以这个manganame为key，所有相同manganame视为重复组

member.summary: Compares the current and new values for a given property. If the value has changed, raises the event, updates the property with the new value, then raises the event.
member.typeparam: The type of the property that changed.
member.param: The field storing the property's value.
The property's value after the change occurred.
(optional) The name of the property that changed.
member.returns: if the property was changed, otherwise.
member.remarks: The and events are not raised if the current and new value for the target property are the same.

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.SetProperty``1(``0,``0,System.Action{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Compares the current and new values for a given property. If the value has changed, raises the event, updates the property with the new value, then raises the event. This overload is much less efficient than and it should only be used when the former is not viable (eg. when the target property being updated does not directly expose a backing field that can be passed by reference). For performance reasons, it is recommended to use a stateful callback if possible through the whenever possible instead of this overload, as that will allow the C# compiler to cache the input callback and reduce the memory allocations. More info on that overload are available in the related XML docs. This overload is here for completeness and in cases where that is not applicable.
member.typeparam: The type of the property that changed.
member.param: The current property value.
The property's value after the change occurred.
A callback to invoke to update the property value.
(optional) The name of the property that changed.
member.returns: if the property was changed, otherwise.
member.remarks: The and events are not raised if the current and new value for the target property are the same.

member.summary: Compares the current and new values for a given nested property. If the value has changed, raises the event, updates the property and then raises the event. The behavior mirrors that of , with the difference being that this method is used to relay properties from a wrapped model in the current instance. See additional notes about this overload in .
member.typeparam: The type of model whose property (or field) to set.
The type of property (or field) to set.
member.param: The current property value.
The property's value after the change occurred.
The instance to use to compare the input values.
The model containing the property being updated.
The callback to invoke to set the target property value, if a change has occurred.
(optional) The name of the property that changed.
member.returns: if the property was changed, otherwise.

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.SetPropertyAndNotifyOnCompletion(EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.TaskNotifier@,System.Threading.Tasks.Task,System.String)
member.param: The field notifier to modify.
The property's value after the change occurred.
(optional) The name of the property that changed.
member.returns: if the property was changed, otherwise.
member.remarks: The and events are not raised if the current and new value for the target property are the same. The return value being only indicates that the new value being assigned to is different than the previous one, and it does not mean the new instance passed as argument is in any particular state.

member.name: M:EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.SetPropertyAndNotifyOnCompletion(EroMangaManager.Core.ViewModels.SameMangaSearchViewModel.TaskNotifier@,System.Threading.Tasks.Task,System.Action{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.String)
member.summary: Compares the current and new values for a given field (which should be the backing field for a property). If the value has changed, raises the event, updates the field and then raises the event. This method is just like , with the difference being an extra parameter with a callback being invoked either immediately, if the new task has already completed or is , or upon completion.

The property's value after the change occurred.
A callback to invoke to update the property value.
(optional) The name of the property that changed.
member.returns: if the property was changed, otherwise.
member.remarks: The and events are not raised if the current and new value for the target property are the same.

member.summary: 设置封面文件路径，因为文件创建涉及到winui，且console程序也不显示图片，所以设置封面单独作为委托，需要手动设置
